diagrams.title: CREATE TABLE Syntax Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the complete syntax breakdown of CREATE TABLE statement with column definitions and table constraints
elements: Table-level constraints (PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, CHECK)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the proper structure and placement of elements in CREATE TABLE statement

diagrams.title: Database Table Relationships
diagrams.description: Visual representation of how tables connect through primary and foreign keys
elements: CHILD table with FOREIGN KEY pointing to parent
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how foreign keys establish relationships between tables for referential integrity

diagrams.title: SQL Constraints Overview
diagrams.description: Diagram showing all six SQL constraints and their visual representation in table structure
diagrams.purpose: Remember all constraint types and their purposes in maintaining data integrity

diagrams.title: Data Type Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Classification of SQL data types organized by category
diagrams.purpose: Choose appropriate data types when defining columns in CREATE TABLE
